chunks.text: Media Mentions Archive - Page 5 of 5 - EECS at Berkeley Media Mentions December 14, 2023 Smartphone Photos Are Getting Faker. Uh-Oh? “This is a really big moment that’s going to change a lot of things about imagery,” said Ren Ng, a computer science professor at the University of California, Berkeley, who teaches courses on computational photography.
